annotations.description: Defines UI tools that the Rancher AI assistant.

config.systemPrompt: You are a helpful assistant for selecting UI components to enhance user experience

defaultValues.systemPrompt: You are a helpful assistant for selecting UI components to enhance user experience

tools.name: show-yaml
tools.description: Display YAML content of a Kubernetes resource
tools.prompt: Display YAML content of a Kubernetes resource displaying kind {resourceKind}, name {resourceName}, in namespace {resourceNamespace} and the yaml file in a yaml editor. The YAML content is: {yaml}. The YAML content should be the same as the content returned in the LLM AI message or even better from the MCP tool call.

resourceKind.description: The resource kind of the Kubernetes resource (Pod, Deployment, etc.)

resourceName.description: The name of the Kubernetes resource

resourceNamespace.description: The namespace of the Kubernetes resource

tools.name: show-yaml-diff
tools.description: Display YAML content differences between an existing Kubernetes resource and a proposed configuration
tools.prompt: Display YAML content differences between an existing Kubernetes resource and a proposed configuration for a Kubernetes resource displaying kind {resourceKind}, name {resourceName}, in namespace {resourceNamespace}. The current YAML content is: {currentContent}. The proposed YAML configuration content is: {newContent}. Both current and proposed YAML contents should be the same as the contents returned in the LLM AI message or even better from the MCP tool call.

currentContent.description: The current YAML content of the resource. It should contain the existing YAML for the resource before changes.

newContent.description: The new YAML content of the resource. It should contain the proposed YAML for the resource after changes.

resourceKind.description: The resource kind of the Kubernetes resource (Pod, Deployment, etc.)

resourceName.description: The name of the Kubernetes resource

resourceNamespace.description: The namespace of the Kubernetes resource

tools.name: navigate-to
tools.description: Navigate to a Rancher UI page
tools.prompt:
Navigate to a Rancher UI page with path {path}.
The {label} is the label the Ui will use to display the link to the page, e.g.: 'View Pod', 'View Pods list'; It should be max 50 characters long.
The {path} should be built based on the Rancher UI routing structure and should lead to a specific page in the Rancher UI.
RULES: 1. GLOBAL: '/home', '/clusters', '/prefs'. 2. CLUSTER: Starts with '/c/:cluster/'. 3. RESOURCE MAPPING (CRITICAL): Use Fully Qualified Names for :resource. Examples: Deployments -> 'apps.deployment', StatefulSets -> 'apps.statefulset', CronJobs -> 'batch.cronjob', Secrets -> 'secret', ConfigMaps -> 'configmap'. 4. LIST: '/c/:cluster/explorer/:resource' (e.g., /c/local/explorer/apps.deployment). 5. DETAIL: '/c/:cluster/explorer/:resource/:namespace/:id'. 6. TOOLS: Use shortcuts for installed apps: '/c/:cluster/monitoring', '/c/:cluster/logging', '/c/:cluster/gatekeeper', '/c/:cluster/istio'. 7. MANAGEMENT: For clusters use '/c/:cluster/manager/provisioning.cattle.io.cluster'.

tools.name: show-logs
tools.description: Display the logs of a container from a Pod in Rancher by opening the logs view from the specified cluster, namespace, and pod
tools.prompt: Display the logs of a container from a Pod in Rancher by opening the logs view from the specified cluster, namespace, and pod. The cluster is: {cluster}, the namespace is: {namespace}, the pod name is: {name}, and the container name is: {containerName}.

cluster.description: Cluster where the Pod is running

name.description: Name of the Pod the container belongs to

containerName.description: Name of the container to show logs for (defaults to first container)

tools.name: download-logs
tools.description: Download logs from a resource in Rancher as a file
tools.prompt: Download logs from a resource in Rancher as a file. The log content is: {logs}. The logs should be the same as the content returned in the LLM AI message or even better from the MCP tool call.

tools.name: navigate-to-fleet
tools.description: Navigate to a Fleet UI page or external resource
tools.prompt: Navigate to a Fleet UI page or external resource

target.description: Open in same or new tab

tools.name: rancher-2-13-specific-tool
tools.description: Display YAML differences between resources, when creating or updating resources
tools.prompt: Display YAML differences between resources, when creating or updating resources
